name: Api

comment:
/**
	 * Common form properties.
	 *
	 * ## Try it
	 * 
	 * ```js use-document-builder
	 * // Create a text form with the common form properties:
	 * var oFormPrBase = {"key": "Personal information", "tip": "Enter your first name", "required": true, "placeholder": "First name"};
	 * var oTextForm = Api.CreateTextForm(oFormPrBase);
	 * ```
	 *
	 * @typedef {Object} FormPrBase
	 * @property {string} key - Form key.
	 * @property {string} tip - Form tip text.
	 * @property {boolean} required - Specifies if the form is required or not.
	 * @property {string} placeholder - Form placeholder text.
	 */
name: FormPrBase

properties.description: Form key.
properties.name: key

properties.description: Form tip text.
properties.name: tip

properties.description: Specifies if the form is required or not.
properties.name: required

properties.description: Form placeholder text.
properties.name: placeholder

comment:
/**
	 * Specific text field properties.
	 *
	 * ## Try it
	 * 
	 * ```js use-document-builder
	 * // Create a text form with the specific text form properties:
	 * var oTextFormPrBase = {"comb": true, "maxCharacters": 10, "cellWidth": 3, "multiLine": false, "autoFit": false};
	 * var oTextForm = Api.CreateTextForm(oTextFormPrBase);
	 * ```
	 *
	 * @typedef {Object} TextFormPrBase
	 * @property {boolean} comb - Specifies if the text field should be a comb of characters with the same cell width. The maximum number of characters must be set to a positive value.
	 * @property {number} maxCharacters - The maximum number of characters in the text field.
	 * @property {number} cellWidth - The cell width for each character measured in millimeters. If this parameter is not specified or equal to 0 or less, then the width will be set automatically.
	 * @property {boolean} multiLine - Specifies if the current fixed size text field is multiline or not.
	 * @property {boolean} autoFit - Specifies if the text field content should be autofit, i.e. whether the font size adjusts to the size of the fixed size form.
	 */
name: TextFormPrBase

properties.description: Specifies if the text field should be a comb of characters with the same cell width. The maximum number of characters must be set to a positive value.
properties.name: comb

properties.description: The maximum number of characters in the text field.
properties.name: maxCharacters

properties.description: The cell width for each character measured in millimeters. If this parameter is not specified or equal to 0 or less, then the width will be set automatically.
properties.name: cellWidth

properties.description: Specifies if the current fixed size text field is multiline or not.
properties.name: multiLine

properties.description: Specifies if the text field content should be autofit, i.e. whether the font size adjusts to the size of the fixed size form.
properties.name: autoFit

comment:
/**
	 * Text field properties.
	 *
	 * ## Try it
	 * 
	 * ```js use-document-builder
	 * // Create a text form with the common and specific text form properties:
	 * var oTextFormPr = {"key": "Personal information", "tip": "Enter your first name", "required": true, "placeholder": "First name", "comb": true, "maxCharacters": 10, "cellWidth": 3, "multiLine": false, "autoFit": false};
	 * var oTextForm = Api.CreateTextForm(oTextFormPr);
	 * ```
	 *
	 * @typedef {FormPrBase | TextFormPrBase} TextFormPr
	 */
name: TextFormPr

comment:
/**
	 * Form insertion specific properties.
	 *
	 * ## Try it
	 * 
	 * ```js use-document-builder
	 * // Insert a text box with the specified text box properties over the selected text:
	 * var oTextFormInsertPr = {"key": "Personal information", "tip": "Enter your first name", "required": true, "placeholder": "Name", "comb": true, "maxCharacters": 10, "cellWidth": 3, "multiLine": false, "autoFit": false, "placeholderFromSelection": true, "keepSelectedTextInForm": false};
	 * oDocument.InsertTextForm(oTextFormInsertPr);
	 * ```
	 *
	 * @typedef {Object} FormInsertPr
	 * @property {boolean} [placeholderFromSelection=false] - Specifies if the currently selected text should be saved as a placeholder of the inserted form.
	 * @property {boolean} [keepSelectedTextInForm=true] - Specifies if the currently selected text should be saved as the content of the inserted form.
	 */
name: FormInsertPr

properties.description: Specifies if the currently selected text should be saved as a placeholder of the inserted form.
properties.name: placeholderFromSelection

properties.description: Specifies if the currently selected text should be saved as the content of the inserted form.
properties.name: keepSelectedTextInForm

comment:
/**
	 * Properties for inserting a text field.
	 *
	 * ## Try it
	 * 
	 * ```js use-document-builder
	 * // Insert a text box with the specified text box properties over the selected text:
	 * var oTextFormInsertPr = {"key": "Personal information", "tip": "Enter your first name", "required": true, "placeholder": "Name", "comb": true, "maxCharacters": 10, "cellWidth": 3, "multiLine": false, "autoFit": false, "placeholderFromSelection": true, "keepSelectedTextInForm": false};
	 * oDocument.InsertTextForm(oTextFormInsertPr);
	 * ```
	 *
	 * @typedef {FormPrBase | TextFormPrBase | FormInsertPr} TextFormInsertPr
	 */
name: TextFormInsertPr

comment:
/**
	 * Specific checkbox / radio button properties.
	 *
	 * ## Try it
	 * 
	 * ```js use-document-builder
	 * // Create a checkbox form with the specific checkbox form properties:
	 * var oCheckBoxFormPrBase = {"radio": true};
	 * var oCheckBoxForm = Api.CreateCheckBoxForm(oCheckBoxFormPrBase);
	 * ```
	 *
	 * @typedef {Object} CheckBoxFormPrBase
	 * @property {boolean} radio - Specifies if the current checkbox is a radio button. In this case, the key parameter is considered as an identifier for the group of radio buttons.
	 */
name: CheckBoxFormPrBase

properties.description: Specifies if the current checkbox is a radio button. In this case, the key parameter is considered as an identifier for the group of radio buttons.
properties.name: radio

comment:
/**
	 * Checkbox / radio button properties.
	 *
	 * ## Try it
	 * 
	 * ```js use-document-builder
	 * // Create a checkbox form with the common and specific checkbox form properties:
	 * var oCheckBoxFormPr = {"key": "Marital status", "tip": "Specify your marital status", "required": true, "placeholder": "Marital status", "radio": true};
	 * var oCheckBoxForm = Api.CreateCheckBoxForm(oCheckBoxFormPr);
	 * ```
	 *
	 * @typedef {FormPrBase | CheckBoxFormPrBase} CheckBoxFormPr
	 */
name: CheckBoxFormPr

comment:
/**
	 * Specific combo box / dropdown list properties.
	 *
	 * ## Try it
	 * 
	 * ```js use-document-builder
	 * // Create a combo box form with the specific combo box form properties:
	 * var oComboBoxFormPrBase = {"editable": false, "autoFit": false, "items": ["Latvia", "USA", "UK"]};
	 * var oComboBoxForm = Api.CreateComboBoxForm(oComboBoxFormPrBase);
	 * ```
	 *
	 * @typedef {Object} ComboBoxFormPrBase
	 * @property {boolean} editable - Specifies if the combo box text can be edited.
	 * @property {boolean} autoFit - Specifies if the combo box form content should be autofit, i.e. whether the font size adjusts to the size of the fixed size form.
	 * @property {Array.<string | Array.<string>>} items - The combo box items.
     * This array consists of strings or arrays of two strings where the first string is the displayed value and the second one is its meaning.
     * If the array consists of single strings, then the displayed value and its meaning are the same.
     * Example: ["First", ["Second", "2"], ["Third", "3"], "Fourth"].

	 */
name: ComboBoxFormPrBase

properties.description: Specifies if the combo box text can be edited.
properties.name: editable

properties.description: Specifies if the combo box form content should be autofit, i.e. whether the font size adjusts to the size of the fixed size form.
properties.name: autoFit

properties.description:
The combo box items.
This array consists of strings or arrays of two strings where the first string is the displayed value and the second one is its meaning.
If the array consists of single strings, then the displayed value and its meaning are the same.
Example: ["First", ["Second", "2"], ["Third", "3"], "Fourth"].
properties.name: items

comment:
/**
	 * Combo box / dropdown list properties.
	 *
	 * ## Try it
	 * 
	 * ```js use-document-builder
	 * // Create a combo box form with the common and specific combo box form properties:
	 * var oComboBoxFormPr = {"key": "Personal information", "tip": "Choose your country", "required": true, "placeholder": "Country", "editable": false, "autoFit": false, "items": ["Latvia", "USA", "UK"]};
	 * var oComboBoxForm = Api.CreateComboBoxForm(oComboBoxFormPr);
	 * ```
	 *
	 * @typedef {FormPrBase | ComboBoxFormPrBase} ComboBoxFormPr
	 */
name: ComboBoxFormPr

comment:
/**
	 * The condition to scale an image in the picture form.
	 *
	 * ## Try it
	 * 
	 * ```js use-document-builder
	 * // Set the scaling condition when the current picture form is scaled if it is too big:
	 * oPictureForm.SetScaleFlag("tooBig");
	 * ```
	 *
	 * @typedef {"always" | "never" | "tooBig" | "tooSmall"} ScaleFlag
	 */
name: ScaleFlag

comment:
/**
	 * Value from 0 to 100.
	 *
	 * ## Try it
	 * 
	 * ```js use-document-builder
	 * // Set the picture position measured in percent inside the current form:
	 * oPictureForm.SetPicturePosition(70, 70);
	 * ```
	 *
	 * @typedef {number} percentage
	 */
name: percentage

comment: /** * Specific picture form properties. * * ## Try it * * ```js use-document-builder * // Create a picture form with the specific picture form properties: * var oPictureFormPrBase = {"scaleFlag": "tooBig", "lockAspectRatio": true, "respectBorders": false, "shiftX": 50, "shiftY": 50}; * var oPictureForm = Api.CreatePictureForm(oPictureFormPrBase); * ``` * * @typedef {Object} PictureFormPrBase * @property {ScaleFlag} scaleFlag - The condition to scale an image in the picture form: "always", "never", "tooBig" or "tooSmall". * @property {boolean} lockAspectRatio - Specifies if the aspect ratio of the picture form is locked or not. * @property {boolean} respectBorders - Specifies if the form border width is respected or not when scaling the image. * @property {percentage} shiftX - Horizontal picture position inside the picture form measured in percent: * * 0 - the picture is placed on the left; * * 50 - the picture is placed in the center; * * 100 - the picture is placed on the right. * @property {percentage} shiftY - Vertical picture position inside the picture form measured in percent: * * 0 - the picture is placed on top; * * 50 - the picture is placed in the center; * * 100 - the picture is placed on the bottom. */
name: PictureFormPrBase

properties.description: The condition to scale an image in the picture form: "always", "never", "tooBig" or "tooSmall".
properties.name: scaleFlag

properties.description: Specifies if the aspect ratio of the picture form is locked or not.
properties.name: lockAspectRatio

properties.description: Specifies if the form border width is respected or not when scaling the image.
properties.name: respectBorders
shiftX
shiftY

comment:
/**
	 * Picture form properties.
	 *
	 * ## Try it
	 * 
	 * ```js use-document-builder
	 * // Create a picture form with the common and specific picture form properties:
	 * var oPictureFormPr = {"key": "Personal information", "tip": "Upload your photo", "required": true, "placeholder": "Photo", "scaleFlag": "tooBig", "lockAspectRatio": true, "respectBorders": false, "shiftX": 50, "shiftY": 50};
	 * var oPictureForm = Api.CreatePictureForm(oPictureFormPr);
	 * ```
	 *
	 * @typedef {FormPrBase | PictureFormPrBase} PictureFormPr
	 */
name: PictureFormPr

	 * @property {number} maxCharacters - The maximum number of characters in the text field.
	 * @property {number} cellWidth - The cell width for each character measured in millimeters. If this parameter is not specified or equal to 0 or less, then the width will be set automatically.
	 * @property {boolean} multiLine - Specifies if the current fixed size text field is multiline or not.
	 * @property {boolean} autoFit - Specifies if the text field content should be autofit, i.e. whether the font size adjusts to the size of the fixed size form.
	 * @extends {ApiFormBase}
	 */
description: Class representing a document text field.

/**
	 * Sets a limit to the text field characters.
	 * @memberof ApiTextForm
	 * @param {number} nChars - The maximum number of characters in the text field. If this parameter is equal to -1, no limit will be set.
	 * A limit is required to be set if a comb of characters is applied.
	 * Maximum value for this parameter is 1000000.
	 * @returns {boolean}
	 */
description: Sets a limit to the text field characters.

params.description:
The maximum number of characters in the text field. If this parameter is equal to -1, no limit will be set.
A limit is required to be set if a comb of characters is applied.
Maximum value for this parameter is 1000000.

/**
	 * Sets date language to current form.
	 * @memberof ApiDateForm
	 * @param {string} sLangId - The possible value for this parameter is a language identifier as defined by
	 * RFC 4646/BCP 47. Example: "en-CA".
	 * @returns {boolean}
	 */
description: Sets date language to current form.

RFC 4646/BCP 47. Example: "en-CA".

params.name: oTextPr

name: GetTextPr
description:
Returns the text properties from the current form.
*This method is used only for text and combo box forms.*

name: Copy
description: Copies the current form (copies with the shape if it exists).

comment:
/**
	 * The condition to scale an image in the picture form.
	 *
	 * ## Try it
	 * 
	 * ```js use-document-builder
	 * // Set the scaling condition when the current picture form is scaled if it is too big:
	 * oPictureForm.SetScaleFlag("tooBig");
	 * ```
	 *
	 * @typedef {"always" | "never" | "tooBig" | "tooSmall"} ScaleFlag
	 */
name: ScaleFlag

comment:
/**
	 * Value from 0 to 100.
	 *
	 * ## Try it
	 * 
	 * ```js use-document-builder
	 * // Set the picture position measured in percent inside the current form:
	 * oPictureForm.SetPicturePosition(70, 70);
	 * ```
	 *
	 * @typedef {number} percentage
	 */
name: percentage

comment:
/**
	 * Form type.
	 * The available form types.
	 * @typedef {"textForm" | "comboBoxForm" | "dropDownForm" | "checkBoxForm" | "radioButtonForm" | "pictureForm"} FormType
	 */
description:
Form type.
The available form types.
name: FormType

comment:
/**
	 * Twentieths of a point (equivalent to 1/1440th of an inch).
	 *
	 * ## Try it
	 * 
	 * ```js use-document-builder
	 * // Set the distance between columns equal to 36 points:
	 * oParagraph.SetEqualColumns(2, 720);
	 * ```
	 *
	 * @typedef {number} twips
	 */
name: twips

comment:
/**
	 * A numeric value from 0 to 255.
	 *
	 * ## Try it
	 * 
	 * ```js use-document-builder
	 * // The resulting color is green, the bytes are measured in decimal numbers:
	 * var oRGBColor = Api.CreateRGBColor(0, 255, 0);
	 * // The resulting color is green, the bytes are measured in hexadecimal numbers:
	 * var oRGBColor = Api.CreateRGBColor(0, 0xff, 0);
	 * ```
	 *
	 * @typedef {number} byte
	 */
name: byte

comment:
/**
	 * Class representing a shape.
	 * @constructor
	 * */
description: Class representing a shape.
name: ApiShape

comment:
/**
	 * Class representing the text properties.
	 * @constructor
	 */
description: Class representing the text properties.
name: ApiTextPr

comment:
/**
	 * Types of all supported forms.
	 *
	 * ## Try it
	 * 
	 * ```js use-document-builder
	 * // Copies a text form
	 * var oCopyTextForm = oTextForm.Copy();
	 * ```
	 *
	 * @typedef {ApiTextForm | ApiComboBoxForm | ApiCheckBoxForm | ApiPictureForm | ApiDateForm | ApiComplexForm} ApiForm
	 */
name: ApiForm

comment:
/**
	 * 1 millimetre equals 1/10th of a centimetre.
	 *
	 * ## Try it
	 * 
	 * ```js use-document-builder
	 * // Set the cell width measured in millimeters to the applied comb of characters:
	 * oTextForm.SetCellWidth(7);
	 * ```
	 *
	 * @typedef {number} mm
	 */
name: mm
